title: NIRDPR Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 14 Junior Fellow and Other Posts
description: The National Institute of Rural Development and Panchayati Raj (NIRDPR) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 14 Junior Fellow, Research Associates, Academic Associate, Junior Accountant, and Senior Accountant Jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their M.E./M. Tech, B.E./B. Tech in Civil Engineering, Post-graduation, MBA can apply for the NIRDPR ...
